# PrivacyQuant

> Versioned statutory knowledge graph and MCP workflow layer for US state consumer privacy law.

PrivacyQuant is a structured, auditable legal reference corpus. Every statutory
requirement is stored as an individually citable YAML node with a Git hash, enabling
downstream consumers to verify the exact law version being cited. The enforcement corpus
covers 84 enforcement actions across 20 state privacy statutes with 48 violation-theory
tags. All content is MIT-licensed. Statutory text is public law.

## Coverage

- **Statutes (20):** CCPA/CPRA, VCDPA, CPA, CTDPA, UCPA, TDPSA, OCPA, MCDPA, ICDPA,
  INCDPA, TIPA, DPDPA, NJDPA, NHDPA, NDPA, KCDPA, MODPA, MCDPA-MN, RIDTPPA, FDBR
- **Statutory nodes:** 146 across 20 statutes
- **Enforcement corpus:** 84 actions, v2.3, 48 violation-theory tags
- **Crosswalks:** IAB/Fideslang data categories, NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5
- **Federal overlays:** HIPAA, GLBA, COPPA, FERPA, FCRA intersection with state law

## Reference documents

- [Applicability matrix](/references/applicability-matrix) — threshold matrix for all 20 states
- [Rights comparison](/references/rights-comparison) — cross-state consumer rights comparison
- [Controller duties](/references/controller-duties) — cross-state controller obligation comparison
- [Sensitive data](/references/sensitive-data) — sensitive data categories and treatment by state
- [Universal opt-out / GPC](/references/universal-opt-out) — UOOM recognition by state and effective dates
- [Enforcement](/references/enforcement) — penalties, cure periods, and enforcement mechanisms
- [Kids and teens](/references/kids-and-teens) — minor/teen provisions and COPPA interaction
- [Federal overlays](/references/federal-overlays) — HIPAA/GLBA/COPPA/FERPA/FCRA intersection
- [AG priorities](/references/ag-priorities) — regulator priority weighting
- [Defense arguments](/references/defense-arguments) — litigation defense framing
- [Fideslang mapping](/references/fideslang-mapping) — IAB/Fideslang data category crosswalk
- [NIST controls mapping](/references/nist-controls-mapping) — NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 crosswalk

## Per-state reference files

- [California (CCPA/CPRA)](/references/states/ca)
- [Virginia (VCDPA)](/references/states/va)
- [Colorado (CPA)](/references/states/co)
- [Connecticut (CTDPA)](/references/states/ct)
- [Texas (TDPSA)](/references/states/tx)
- [Florida (FDBR)](/references/states/fl)
- [New Jersey (NJDPA)](/references/states/nj)
- [New Hampshire (NHDPA)](/references/states/nh)
- [Oregon (OCPA)](/references/states/or)
- [Montana (MCDPA)](/references/states/mt)
- [Iowa (ICDPA)](/references/states/ia)
- [Indiana (INCDPA)](/references/states/in)
- [Tennessee (TIPA)](/references/states/tn)
- [Delaware (DPDPA)](/references/states/de)
- [North Dakota (NDPA)](/references/states/nd)
- [Kentucky (KCDPA)](/references/states/ky)
- [Missouri (MODPA)](/references/states/mo)
- [Minnesota (MCDPA-MN)](/references/states/mn)
- [Rhode Island (RIDTPPA)](/references/states/ri)
- [Utah (UCPA)](/references/states/ut)

## Raw data

- [Enforcement actions corpus (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/foolish-bandit/privacyquant/main/references/enforcement_actions.json)
- [Fideslang mapping (YAML)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/foolish-bandit/privacyquant/main/references/fideslang-mapping.yaml)
- [NIST controls mapping (YAML)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/foolish-bandit/privacyquant/main/references/nist-controls-mapping.yaml)

## MCP integration

PrivacyQuant exposes 16 MCP tools for programmatic access. Install via Claude Code:

```
/plugin marketplace add foolish-bandit/privacyquant
```

Full tool documentation: https://github.com/foolish-bandit/privacyquant/blob/main/docs/TOOLS.md

## License

MIT. Statutory text is public law. Node content is original analytical work product.
IAB/Fideslang taxonomy (CC-BY 4.0). NIST crosswalk data (public domain).

https://github.com/foolish-bandit/privacyquant
